title: Death Guard
name: Death Guard
battleCry: Life is nothing! Death is everything!
specialty: Endurance, guerre biologique, bénédiction de Nurgle
lore: The XIVth Legion of Mortarion. Once the Dusk Raiders — warriors of implacable endurance, siege-breakers without peer in the Great Crusade.

They fell to Chaos in the Warp en route to Terra, when a pox of unnatural origin swept their fleet. Mortarion bargained with Nurgle for their survival; Nurgle granted it, and they have been his ever since.
In the Era Indomitus they launched the Plague Wars against Ultramar. They are bloated, patient, unkillable — walking gifts of their grandfather's rotting affection.
